Uses of Interface
io.github.igorgf.control.Validation

Packages that use Validation
Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.

  • Uses of Validation in io.github.igorgf.control

    Subinterfaces of Validation in io.github.igorgf.control
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    (package private) interface 
    Invalid<E,T>
    The invalid, left side, extension of Validation<E, T>.
    Classes in io.github.igorgf.control that implement Validation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) final record 
    Accumulated<E,T>
    The invalid, left side, implementation of Validation<E, T>, inheriting shared failed validation behavior from Invalid<E, T>.
    (package private) final record 
    Critical<E,T>
    The invalid, left side, implementation of Validation<E, T>, inheriting shared failed validation behavior from Invalid<E, T>.
    (package private) final record 
    Valid<E,T>
    The validation target T value, right side, implementation of Validation<E, T>.

    Description

    Accumulated.foldErrors(CheckedFunction<? super List<E>, ? extends U, ? extends X> errorMapper)
    Allows collapsing contained errors into a new type U, when this is Invalid.

    Allows collapsing contained errors into a new type U, when this is Invalid.

    Allows collapsing contained errors into a new type U, when this is Invalid.

    Validation.foldErrors(CheckedFunction<? super List<E>, ? extends U, ? extends X> errorMapper)
    Allows collapsing contained errors into a new type U, when this is Invalid.
    <U, X extends Exception>
    Validation<U,T>
    Accumulated.mapError(CheckedFunction<? super E, ? extends U, ? extends X> errorMapper)
    Allows item by item conversion of any contained errors from type E to type U, when this is Invalid.

    Validation<U,T>

    Allows item by item conversion of any contained errors from type E to type U, when this is Invalid.

    Validation.validate(T value, Predicate<? super T> predicate, Function<? super T, ? extends E> errorMapper, boolean critical)
    A convenience factory method for creating a Validation<E, T> based on the result of value being tested against predicate.
